title: The Evacuation of East Prussia
strengths: Provides a city-bounded trapped-civilian count at the moment the final storming began.
limitations: The resulting civilian death statement is qualitative ('tens of thousands') and not separated into direct versus indirect mortality.
notes: Best open source for the city-bounded civilian denominator.

title: Appendix 1: Strength of Königsberg’s Garrison, 6 April 1945
strengths: Gives a narrower battle-strength number for the garrison on the opening day of the final assault.
limitations: Accessible open text is only a snippet rather than the full appendix table.
notes: Useful for the low end of the combatant-exposure range.

title: Conquering Königsberg Fortress
strengths: Provides a total defender count and notes that the figure includes Volkssturm.
limitations: Secondary narrative article; not as strong as an archival appendix.
notes: Used for the mid-point defender total, not for the core death numerators.

title: Hitler's Lost State: The Fall of Prussia and the Wilhelm Gustloff Tragedy
strengths: Provides both a narrow active-phase Soviet force and a broader total assault-force figure.
limitations: Only an accessible snippet was available in the open workflow used here.
notes: Used only to span a combatant-exposure range.
